variants: Hector Aguirre is a renowned expert in hydraulic engineering, recognized for his innovative contributions to the field. His notable invention, the Lanternflare Modulator, has significantly improved the efficiency of fluid containment systems. In addition to his engineering accomplishments, Hector is also a proud member of the Ember Recluse Society, where he shares his passion for hydraulic systems with fellow enthusiasts. For his dedication to his craft, he received the prestigious Midnight Lantern Token. Hector's work continues to inspire many, including his former mentor, Antonia Fink, who has played a crucial role in shaping his career.
